reasoning: The primary limiter is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance, as evidenced by your 9.3% drop from 5-min to 20-min power. In your last ride, you averaged 167.3W, which, although indicated recovery, highlights the need to push at higher sustained efforts. This workout targets sustained power improvement for the Alpine Loop event, specifically the key climb from Sundance to Cascade Springs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x 10-minute over-unders at 201-218W / 242-256W with 5-minute recovery at 60% FTP between intervals.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
